name: io.algochains/algochains-mcp-server
description: AI-to-broker trading protocol: 503 tools across 20 domains. Live futures bots (MNQ/CL/MES/NQ) with real fills, copy-trade signals, MCPT strategy validation, and a hosted paper account requiring zero broker credentials.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOCHAINS_SUBSCRIBER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: sub_live_* key from algochains.ai (free paper tier).

environmentVariables.name: OWNER_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Owner token for live trading and destructive tools.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOCHAINS_TOOL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: smart (168 tools, default) or full (503 tools).
